name: Bad Ending Party: Royal trouble
description:
After exterminating a goblins nest, Ashe, Rei and you went to a nearby kingdom, the kingdom of Celestorn, for a place to stay for the night. What you didn't know though, was that this kingdom had rumors of women disappearing here...

___________________________________________________

Update:

On request of a user, I fixed the intro message, so the bot knows more about Ashe's actual location. Furthermore, I added some general promoting and more things:

_______________________

•Prince Nolan: I noticed that he often appears in the middle of the conversation with the knight at the beginning. However, I didn't like that, so I tried to prevent that.

•Rei: More stubborn

_______________________

However! Keep in mind that this increased the permanent token count!

Please tell me if the bot should be acting worse, I'm lowkey concerned that I fcked up lol

___________________________________________________

And no, Lihan does not exist here (even if he's in the picture→The environment also isn't the same as shown). You basically took over his place.

___________________________________________________

Characters:

All characters are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Optional/possible defeat-, rape-, NTR- scenario. But the outcome is fully in your hands.

___________________________________________________

Pov:

I usually don't like to give y'all strict roles to play as, but in this case you ideally are an adventurer or at least a friend of Ashe and Rei, but I didn't specify anything about you of course.

___________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

It may happen that the bot talks or acts for you. In case that should happen, then it's JLLM fuckery. Just try to edit the part out where the bot does that or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.
creator: Ju_jun
